column6:
This is Pepsi's new configuration. Originally they used U007 with LEAF Si keys. This configuration introduces a new LEAF Cc custom keyset.

Readers must work with existing ASK cards, though all ASK readers will be swapped out before new cards are issued.

Pepsi didn't want to change the facility code, so the prox filter will need to filter all BID's greater than or equal to 55,000. (Last known BID purchased was 27,504)

Keypad behavior for WS is normal.

Keypad behavior for FM: Backlight on keys does not blink on keypress. They stay on.

NOTE: FM 1.4.3.0 read BLE MyPass and reported it as 40 bits. MyPass should be fully disabled in future versions of this configuration!!!

column2: Pepsi wants to use the same facility code so all BID's of 55,000 and greater will need to be rejected. (W35-0)
